text.title: Multi-Agent Production Bus Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules every production MessageBus design MUST enforce.

rule.statement: All inter-agent messages MUST carry structured content (JSON-serializable dict or Pydantic schema). Free-form strings are forbidden via the bus.
rule.rationale: Structured content enables schema validation, machine-readable history, and cost attribution.

rule.statement: Every handler invocation MUST be wrapped with asyncio.wait_for(handler(message), timeout=handler_timeout_seconds). Bare await on a handler is forbidden.
rule.rationale: One slow handler blocks the entire send() coroutine; without a timeout a single agent hangs the bus.

rule.statement: BROADCAST dispatch MUST exclude the sender. A sender receiving its own broadcast triggers infinite ping-pong loops.
rule.rationale: Self-receipt creates exponential amplification under broadcast.

rule.statement: A handler MUST NOT await a response from the message's original sender within the same send() chain. Use a fresh REQUEST cycle with its own timeout.
rule.rationale: Same-loop circular awaits deadlock; the planner blocks on the worker that blocks on the planner.

rule.statement: Each agent MUST carry budget_tokens in the roster. The bus MUST abort the run when an agent crosses its budget; per-run cap MUST also be enforced.
rule.rationale: N agents × M strategies = N×M LLM calls; a runaway loop drains the bill before humans react.

rule.statement: Every LLM call MUST be tagged with the agent role and the strategy currently executing. agentops / LangSmith integration is mandatory in production.
rule.rationale: Untagged calls make cost attribution impossible; you can't tell which agent caused the spike.

rule.statement: When chain_shape == 'linear' AND subtasks_independent == false, the spec MUST select sequential dispatch.
rule.rationale: Sequential is the cheapest, most predictable choice for linear pipelines.

rule.statement: When subtasks_independent == true, the spec MUST select parallel (asyncio.gather) dispatch — each gathered task wrapped in its own timeout.
rule.rationale: Parallel maximises throughput when tasks share no data dependency.

rule.statement: When subtasks_independent == false AND chain_shape != 'linear', the spec MUST select hierarchical (planner + worker dispatch + synthesizer).
rule.rationale: Hierarchical produces a traceable assignment log for dependent-dag workloads.
